failedAssertions.reason: Lead drawer and score popover evidence showed outreach and EV factor, but homestead badge criterion was not satisfied because homestead signal was not rendered from current leads dataset.
Composed search+status+sort+pagination worked, but insurer filter could not be exercised because available options contained only "All insurers" in the tested dataset.
Mobile filter/search/pagination interactions worked, but full new-filter functionality was incomplete because insurer filter had no selectable insurer option beyond "All insurers".
